headline: If You Invested $1000 in Microchip Technology 10 Years Ago, This Is How Much You'd Have Now
summary: Why investing for the long run, especially if you buy certain popular stocks, could reap huge rewards.

headline: Microchip Tech (MCHP) Moves 9.9% Higher: Will This Strength Last?
summary: Microchip Tech (MCHP) was a big mover last session on higher-than-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions might help the stock continue moving higher in the near term.

headline: Microchip Technology (MCHP) Earnings in Focus, Hits 2-Year High
summary: Microchip Technology Inc. (NASDAQ:MCHP) is one of the 10 Stocks Posting Outsized Gains. Microchip jumped to a nearly two-year high on Thursday, as investors resumed buying positions ahead of the results of its earnings performance for the fourth quarter of fiscal year 2026. In intra-day trading, the stock surged to a record high of $92.24 […]
